subject: AP Physics C: Mechanics

units.name: Energy and Momentum of Rotating Systems

notes: Historical 2012-2019 released/practice exams use 35 MCQ and 3 FRQ.
Current AP Central exam structure is tracked separately and should not be inferred from these historical exams.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Physics C: Mechanics Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
